Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add GKS Schema Registry design document

Design for a central aggregator tool that captures JSON schema state
across ga4gh/gks-core, ga4gh/vrs, ga4gh/cat-vrs, and ga4gh/va-spec repos.
Tracks all releases and schema maturity levels (draft, trial use, normative).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
